title: Consumer spending drives Q4 growth (Retail)
summary: Fourth quarter GDP exceeded forecasts at 3.2% annualized growth, driven by robust consumer spending. Retail sales climbed 2.8% in December, 'surpassing all expectations' per Commerce Department data. Holiday shopping season concluded with strongest performance in five years.

title: Auto industry shifts to electric platforms (Manufacturing)
summary: Major automakers announced $50 billion in combined electric vehicle investments for 2024. Industry transition accelerates as 'consumer demand for EVs reaches inflection point.' Traditional manufacturing lines retooling for battery production.
